benefits.description: Felt appetite suppression and cessation of food noise from the first dose

side_effects.description: No blunting of MDMA/candy flip effects observed when boofing at 3 weeks / 2mg into Reta protocol

protocol_notes: She and her husband both used Retatrutide; she was at 2mg/week and husband was microdosing (~1mg/week) at 3 weeks in. Boofed MDMA/candy flip during this time and reported normal experience. Husband's data included separately below.
